content.problemStatement:
Explain the concept of GUI programming in Python and describe the basic components
of a Tkinter window.---4m

code.Python3:
import numpy as np

# Given fixed matrix
matrix = np.array([
    [98, 62, 24, 10],
    [96, 5, 69, 53],
    [8, 27, 32, 44],
    [55, 14, 37, 24]
])

# Compute sums
row_sum = matrix.sum(axis=1)
col_sum = matrix.sum(axis=0)

# Print in required format
print("Matrix:")
print(matrix)

print("\nRow Sum:")
print(row_sum)

print("\nColumn Sum:")
print(col_sum)
